persona.hashMethod: Hash the file bytes directly. Do not extract the prompt through jq, JSON string decoding, command substitution, or a text shell pipeline.

environment.credentialPolicy: Reuse the existing minimum-privilege dev-write-eval profile. Never print, copy into the repository, attach, or include the credential in evidence.

checks: Read this scope contract once and hash its file bytes directly.
Read persona.promptPath once and hash its file bytes directly without any text transformation.
Verify persona encoding, trailing-newline flag, byte length, and byte SHA-256.
Verify thread id, cwd, novice persona, model, thinking, candidate version, commit, tag, tarball size and SHA-256, environment hash, allowed materials, and prohibited actions.

requiredEvidencePerWorkflow: first-attempt CLI stdout/stderr and exit code with secrets redacted
preview, approval, and execute hash comparison
backend API response and follow-up object state
real Codex in-app browser screenshot from this round
visual recognition of title, body, formatting, visibility/status, and end-user accessibility

adverseExplorationObjectives: Try to execute direct topic/reply commands without workflow and prove zero write requests.
Try missing approval, expired approval, changed request body, changed target, mismatched confirmation, stale version, and duplicate completion.
Inject 401, 409, 429, timeout, and 5xx in a fresh round-specific black-box harness; prove retries reuse the same request and operationKey where allowed, while 409 requires a new workflow.
Call every preview-only MCP tool and prove willExecute=false and zero write network requests.
Attempt placeholder and secret-like content before preview; prove it is blocked and no secret appears in evidence.

evidenceContract.issuesAdmission: Only actual first-attempt product findings from this fresh task. Each issue must include threadId, assignmentRef, scenarioOrExplorationRef, observedCliVersion, firstAttemptEvidencePreserved, actualOutputSummary, expectedUserOutcome, and responsibilityAssessment.

allowedPublicMaterials: the exact persona prompt byte file identified by persona.promptPath
the supplied tarball and files packaged inside it
public apexcn --help, commands --json, mcp tools --json, README, migration and manuals
the isolated dev API responses and rendered dev pages generated by this round
prohibitedActions: Do not read /Users/kwang/apexcn-cli source files or unbundled implementation details.
Do not open or reuse any previous validator task, old harness, old run directory, or historical screenshot.
Do not open or reuse intake-only task 019f7284-68d0-77c3-bd2a-7afcf2f0c90a or any discarded directory created by it.
Do not use hidden subagents as the validator.
Do not create another community account.
Do not print, copy, persist, attach, or expose any API key.
Do not write outside the approved isolated dev surface.
Do not perform any production community write.
Do not enable MCP execute-write or simulate approval through MCP.
Do not count database-only evidence as write-back acceptance.
